framework.note_on_rates: All triage rates in the ledger derive from VIEWs (filtered scope), not raw tables. A column with 42% NULL in matches_raw can be ~26% NULL in matches_1v1_clean. The ledger is authoritative for downstream decisions because Phase 02 features are computed from the VIEWs.

thresholds.threshold_source: Operational starting heuristics from temp/null_handling_recommendations.md §1.2; <5% MCAR boundary citation: Schafer & Graham 2002; warning against rigid global thresholds: van Buuren 2018

override_priority: 1. Identity-column branch (B5): identity cols routed to mechanism=N/A, RETAIN_AS_IS
2. Constants detection (n_distinct == 1 AND zero NULLs AND zero sentinels) -> mechanism=N/A, DROP_COLUMN
4. _recommend() per spec/fallback (incl. CONVERT_SENTINEL_TO_NULL for sentinel-only low-rate cases)
5. Target-column post-step (col in target_cols AND n_total_missing > 0) -> EXCLUDE_TARGET_NULL_ROWS

rating.justification: Unranked matches lack rating. In matches_1v1_clean (ranked scope), effective NULL rate is ~26% -- primary feature, not dropped per Rule S4 exception. The matches_1v1_clean VIEW asserts `rating >= 0` upstream, so the -1 sentinel is filtered before the audit sees it; n_sentinel=0 in the ledger reflects upstream filtering, not absence of the encoding. Source: 01_03_03 + this audit.

country.justification: Player chose not to disclose country. Source: 01_02_04 distribution.

won.justification: Unranked / unknown leaderboards lack won. Excluded from prediction scope (matches_1v1_clean enforces via R03); retained in player_history_all for feature computation. Source: 01_03_02 + R03.

server.justification: Structurally absent for certain API versions. 01_02_04 reports null_pct=97.99%.

modDataset.justification: Scenario-specific; absent for ranked random map. 01_02_04 reports null_pct=99.72%.

scenario.justification: Custom scenario only; absent for ranked random map. 01_02_04 reports null_pct=98.27%.

antiquityMode.justification: Schema-evolution column: introduced in a later patch; missingness depends on observed match patch (a recorded variable). 01_02_04 reports null_pct=68.66%.

mod.justification: Group C boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence -- ranked-1v1 default. Constants-detection backstop applies.

map.justification: Map name; near-zero null in ranked 1v1 scope per 01_02_04. Categorical feature.

difficulty.justification: AI difficulty; near-zero null in ranked-1v1 scope per 01_02_04. Constants-detection backstop applies (likely constant in ranked).

startingAge.justification: Game setting; near-zero null in ranked-1v1 scope per 01_02_04. Constants-detection backstop applies.

fullTechTree.justification: Boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence -- ranked-1v1 default.

allowCheats.justification: Boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence -- ranked-1v1 default. NULL-cluster member (R04).

empireWarsMode.justification: Boolean game mode; 01_02_04 evidence -- variant indicator.

lockSpeed.justification: Boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence. NULL-cluster member.

lockTeams.justification: Boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence. NULL-cluster member.

recordGame.justification: Boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence. NULL-cluster member.

regicideMode.justification: Boolean game mode; 01_02_04 evidence -- variant indicator.

sharedExploration.justification: Boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence. NULL-cluster member.

teamPositions.justification: Boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence. NULL-cluster member.

teamTogether.justification: Boolean game setting; 01_02_04 evidence. NULL-cluster member.

turboMode.justification: Boolean game mode; 01_02_04 evidence. NULL-cluster member.

color.justification: In-game color code; near-zero null per 01_02_04.

colorHex.justification: Color as hex; near-zero null per 01_02_04.

slot.justification: Player slot index; near-zero null per 01_02_04.

team.justification: Team number; sentinel 255 per matches_raw schema YAML notes.

is_null_cluster.justification: Derived flag from VIEW DDL (R04). Always non-NULL by construction.

decisions_surfaced.columns: server (97.39% in matches_1v1_clean / ~98% in raw matches_raw), scenario (100.00% / ~98.3%), modDataset (100.00% / ~99.7%), password (77.57% via 40-80% MAR-non-primary path / ~82.9% raw)
decisions_surfaced.question: All four -> DROP_COLUMN at 01_04_02+ (per Rule S4). 'scenario' and 'modDataset' are 100% NULL in cleaned scope (every row is NULL -- drop is unambiguous). 'password' falls below the 80% boundary in the cleaned scope and is routed through the 40-80% non-primary cost-benefit path; intent (drop) is the same. Note: VIEW rates differ from raw rates due to the matches_1v1_clean ranked-1v1 filter -- see the plan's note_on_rates for the principle.

decisions_surfaced.columns: antiquityMode (60.06% in matches_1v1_clean / ~68.66% in raw -- falls in 40-80% non-primary band -> DROP_COLUMN), hideCivs (37.18% in matches_1v1_clean / ~49.30% in raw -- now falls in 5-40% band -> FLAG_FOR_IMPUTATION, NOT DROP_COLUMN as raw-rate framing implied)
decisions_surfaced.question: Phase 02 decides if the imputed-with-indicator hideCivs is predictive; if not, drop in 01_04_02+. The recommendation drift between raw-rate (~49% suggesting drop) and VIEW-rate (37% suggesting flag) is a direct consequence of the matches_1v1_clean filter narrowing the scope; the audit reports VIEW-rate as authoritative.

decisions_surfaced.columns: mod, map, difficulty, startingAge, fullTechTree, allowCheats, empireWarsMode, endingAge, gameMode, lockSpeed, lockTeams, mapSize, population, recordGame, regicideMode, gameVariant, resources, sharedExploration, speed, speedFactor, suddenDeathMode, civilizationSet, teamPositions, teamTogether, treatyLength, turboMode, victory, revealMap
decisions_surfaced.question: Low-NULL game settings group. Each gets individual 01_02_04-grounded justification. Downstream disposition is RETAIN_AS_IS / FLAG_FOR_IMPUTATION per rate.

decisions_surfaced.column: rating in matches_1v1_clean (~26% NULL in 1v1 scope per VIEW)
decisions_surfaced.question: Primary feature exception per Rule S4. Phase 02 imputation strategy (median-within-leaderboard + add_indicator) must be specified before Phase 02 begins.

decisions_surfaced.column: country (~12.6% in raw, lower in 1v1 VIEW)
decisions_surfaced.question: Phase 02 -- 'Unknown' category encoding or add_indicator.
0 NULLs (R03 guarantees) -- per F1 zero-missingness override, ledger reports RETAIN_AS_IS / mechanism=N/A. Target-override post-step does NOT fire.
MAR; per the target-override post-step, recommendation becomes EXCLUDE_TARGET_NULL_ROWS. Feature computation must skip NULL-target rows.
NOT_USABLE per 01_03_03; profiles_raw has 7 dead columns (100% NULL). Formally declare out-of-analytical-scope at 01_04_02+ -- these tables do not enter any VIEW and do not need triage.
